subject: npmx Weekly #22
headline: npmx Weekly #22
intro: Dive into this week's top highlights from the npm ecosystem. From exciting community recognition to major dependency updates, we've got you covered!

topics.title: Community Recognition
topics.summary: A developer shares their excitement about having their libraries featured on npmx.dev, showcasing the platform's commitment to elevating community contributions within the npm ecosystem.

topics.title: Dependency Updates
topics.summary: PR #2943 updates the @floating-ui/vue dependency to version 2.0.0, dropping support for Vue 2 and ensuring compatibility with the latest Vue features for optimal performance.

topics.title: Sisteransi Transition to ESM
topics.summary: The sisteransi library has transitioned to ECMAScript Module (ESM) only, a significant update expected to enhance performance and compatibility, benefiting the library's 56 million weekly downloads.
